name: ljg-skills
description: Personal Claude Code skills collection for paper reading, content casting, and writing workflows

skills.name: ljg-card
skills.description: Content caster - transforms content into PNG visuals (long card, infograph, poster)

skills.name: ljg-paper
skills.description: Academic paper analysis pipeline for non-academics

skills.name: ljg-paper-flow
skills.description: Paper workflow - reads papers and generates cards in one go

skills.name: ljg-plain
skills.description: Plain language rewriter - makes complex content accessible

skills.name: ljg-skill-map
skills.description: Visual overview of all installed skills

skills.name: ljg-word
skills.description: English word deep-dive and mastery tool

skills.name: ljg-writes
skills.description: Writing engine for thinking through ideas

requirements.note: ljg-card requires Playwright for screenshot capture
